offer: For medical clinics processing 50–100 patient records/month, disorganization causes delays in patient care. We automate record organization instead of manual filing and storage of patient records.
problem: Disorganized patient records leading to inefficiencies in patient care.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to medical clinics with a demo video
Participate in community forums for medical tools
try_it: Let users test manual entry and searchable storage on 1-3 records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Create templates for common record types
Allow CSV import of existing patient data
